title: Very poor performance (or hang?) of n-most-common query over varchar
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE foo (n String NOT NULL, m Int32 DEFAULT 0, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
SELECT n, COUNT(*) AS c FROM foo GROUP BY n ORDER BY c DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT n) FROM foo WHERE n IS NOT NULL;
SELECT n, COUNT(*) AS c FROM foo WHERE m > 0 GROUP BY n HAVING c > 1 ORDER BY c DESC;
key_bug_features: n-most-common query over varchar data type
